name: metaswarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code and Codex CLI, with an optional enterprise/API-key Gemini adapter — 18 agents, 14 skills, quality gates, and TDD enforcement

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent orchestration, quality gates, TDD, and PR shepherding for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use metaswarm to plan, decompose, execute, review, and shepherd development work with specialized agent roles, BEADS-backed tracking, strict quality gates, host-platform support for Claude Code and Codex CLI, and an optional enterprise/API-key Gemini adapter.
defaultPrompt: Use metaswarm to set up this project.
Use metaswarm to start tracked work on this task.
Use metaswarm to shepherd this PR until it is ready to merge.
